Document:
# Big Guns
Big Guns are heavy weapons that deal devastating damage. They are difficult to carry and expensive to feed, but nothing matches their raw stopping power once a fight turns serious.
## Miniguns
Miniguns deliver overwhelming volume of fire and are best used for suppression, defense, and faction-level fire superiority.
## Launchers
Grenade and missile launchers are area-denial weapons that break fortified positions and punish clustered enemies.
## Light Machine Guns
LMGs provide sustained automatic fire and excel in prepared positions or coordinated squad fights.
## Flamers
The flamer projects burning fuel across a wide area and is especially effective against creatures and lightly armored targets.
[color=red]Warning:[/color] Big Guns are usually restricted to military-grade factions. Carrying one openly is enough to attract attention almost anywhere in the Wasteland.
